initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    (t_nov.T-CHO - t_dec.T-CHO) * 1.0 / t_nov.T-CHO AS decrease_rate
FROM 
    Patient p
    JOIN Laboratory t_nov ON p.ID = t_nov.ID AND t_nov.Date LIKE '1981-11%'
    JOIN Laboratory t_dec ON p.ID = t_dec.ID AND t_dec.Date LIKE '1981-12%'
WHERE 
    p.Birthday = '1959-02-18'
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    (t_nov.T-CHO - t_dec.T-CHO) * 1.0 / t_nov.T-CHO AS decrease_rate
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Laboratory t_nov ON p.ID = t_nov.ID
JOIN 
    Laboratory t_dec ON p.ID = t_dec.ID
WHERE 
    p.Birthday = '1959-02-18'
    AND t_nov.Date LIKE '1981-11%'
    AND t_dec.Date LIKE '1981-12%';

SELECT 
    (t_nov.`T-CHO` - t_dec.`T-CHO`) * 1.0 / t_nov.`T-CHO` AS decrease_rate
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Laboratory t_nov ON p.ID = t_nov.ID
JOIN 
    Laboratory t_dec ON p.ID = t_dec.ID
WHERE 
    p.Birthday = '1959-02-18'
    AND t_nov.Date LIKE '1981-11%'
    AND t_dec.Date LIKE '1981-12%';

SELECT 
    (t_nov.`T-CHO` - t_dec.`T-CHO`) * 1.0 / t_nov.`T-CHO` AS decrease_rate
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Laboratory t_nov ON p.ID = t_nov.ID
JOIN 
    Laboratory t_dec ON p.ID = t_dec.ID
WHERE 
    p.Birthday = '1959-02-18'
    AND t_nov.Date LIKE '1981-11%'
    AND t_dec.Date LIKE '1981-12%';

SELECT (nov.T-CHO - dec.T-CHO) * 1.0 / nov.T-CHO AS decrease_rate
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory nov ON p.ID = nov.ID
JOIN Laboratory dec ON p.ID = dec.ID
WHERE p.Birthday = '1959-02-18'
  AND nov.Date LIKE '1981-11%'
  AND dec.Date LIKE '1981-12%';
